description: The S.H.I.E.L.D. team on Zephyr One splits up: Coulson, May, Mack, Fitz and Simmons head for the Transia facility, while Daisy and Lincoln are dispatched to meet James, a mercenary and potential Inhuman from Afterlife. The group strategizes on how to confront Giyera and learn more about the ancient Inhuman threat.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Once we begin, there's no turning back. Whatever happens.
